description: A potential enterprise customer is requesting changes to the standard Master Service Agreement (MSA), specifically regarding liability limits.

nodes.task_description: Receive the customer's requested redlines for the MSA.

expected_outcome.expected: Account Executive understands the customer's legal concerns.

nodes.task_description: Consult the internal legal playbook for pre-approved fallback positions on liability.

expected_outcome.expected: Account Executive finds an approved alternative clause.

nodes.task_description: If the request is outside standard fallbacks, escalate the redlines to the legal department for review and approval.

expected_outcome.expected: Account Executive correctly escalates the non-standard request.
